problem id: 978c688b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00111000 -> 10000001
  01100100 -> 01000011
  11100001 -> 00010111
  01110100 -> 01000011
  01001011 -> 10110010
  00011110 -> 11100000
  01100011 -> 00110011
  10101011 -> 10110101

query: 11111101
predicted answer: 11010111
